root.m_Talk_DEU: After overcoming so many trials, you've finally earned the chance to fight the Demon Lord on equal footing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: After overcoming so many trials, you've finally earned the chance to fight the Demon Lord on equal footing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. At last, we're going to destroy the source of that damned tree root trying to swallow this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. At last, we're going to destroy the source of that damned tree root trying to swallow this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. At last, we're going to destroy the source of that damned tree root trying to swallow this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The coordinates we need to head to have already been verified over a hundred times. The margin of error is practically zero.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The coordinates we need to head to have already been verified over a hundred times. The margin of error is practically zero.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The coordinates we need to head to have already been verified over a hundred times. The margin of error is practically zero.

root.m_Talk_ENG: These coordinates... They're different from where we found the Bronze Tree.
root.m_Talk_DEU: These coordinates... They're different from where we found the Bronze Tree.
root.m_Talk_FRA: These coordinates... They're different from where we found the Bronze Tree.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I judged that opening a direct path would be too dangerous. Unidentified energy is interfering. It's probably because it's a place directly under the Demon Lord's influence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I judged that opening a direct path would be too dangerous. Unidentified energy is interfering. It's probably because it's a place directly under the Demon Lord's influence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I judged that opening a direct path would be too dangerous. Unidentified energy is interfering. It's probably because it's a place directly under the Demon Lord's influence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, at this distance, it should be manageable on foot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, at this distance, it should be manageable on foot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, at this distance, it should be manageable on foot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The problem is the Demon Lord will likely interfere while we're making our way there...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The problem is the Demon Lord will likely interfere while we're making our way there...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The problem is the Demon Lord will likely interfere while we're making our way there...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, for now, taking a slight detour is our best option, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, for now, taking a slight detour is our best option, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, for now, taking a slight detour is our best option, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, look up at the sky over there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, look up at the sky over there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, look up at the sky over there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those are dimensional ships, aren't they?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those are dimensional ships, aren't they?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those are dimensional ships, aren't they?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are all of them heading into the tunnel?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are all of them heading into the tunnel?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are all of them heading into the tunnel?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're the Ground One TASKFORCEs that joined under the Administration's mobilization order.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're the Ground One TASKFORCEs that joined under the Administration's mobilization order.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're the Ground One TASKFORCEs that joined under the Administration's mobilization order.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the highest danger level with no guarantee of survival, and no operational compensation was offered.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the highest danger level with no guarantee of survival, and no operational compensation was offered.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the highest danger level with no guarantee of survival, and no operational compensation was offered.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And even so, that many still gathered?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And even so, that many still gathered?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And even so, that many still gathered?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought everyone was busy protecting the city.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought everyone was busy protecting the city.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought everyone was busy protecting the city.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Holding the front lines is important too, but someone has to head to the heart of the war and put an end to this slaughter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Holding the front lines is important too, but someone has to head to the heart of the war and put an end to this slaughter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Holding the front lines is important too, but someone has to head to the heart of the war and put an end to this slaughter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the Administration isn't the only one qualified to take on that role.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the Administration isn't the only one qualified to take on that role.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the Administration isn't the only one qualified to take on that role.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Some of them are personally entangled with Demon Lord Thagirion as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Some of them are personally entangled with Demon Lord Thagirion as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Some of them are personally entangled with Demon Lord Thagirion as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Activate the Great Well's designated coordinates. Ignore the maximum output setting and deploy a hyperwide tunnel all the way to the final destination.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Activate the Great Well's designated coordinates. Ignore the maximum output setting and deploy a hyperwide tunnel all the way to the final destination.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Activate the Great Well's designated coordinates. Ignore the maximum output setting and deploy a hyperwide tunnel all the way to the final destination.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Output overload at 350%...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Output overload at 350%...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Output overload at 350%...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Passing 1500%...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Passing 1500%...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Passing 1500%...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The measuring instruments have melted. We can't measure the overclock value anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The measuring instruments have melted. We can't measure the overclock value anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The measuring instruments have melted. We can't measure the overclock value anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ignore it and keep increasing the output.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ignore it and keep increasing the output.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ignore it and keep increasing the output.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Filter recovery device activated. Deploying all reserved Alternium.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Filter recovery device activated. Deploying all reserved Alternium.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Filter recovery device activated. Deploying all reserved Alternium.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Well... It's sinking. It's like the ground is melting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Well... It's sinking. It's like the ground is melting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Well... It's sinking. It's like the ground is melting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a spatial distortion phenomenon caused by the tunnel connecting. You can't see it, but the time axis is probably being distorted too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a spatial distortion phenomenon caused by the tunnel connecting. You can't see it, but the time axis is probably being distorted too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a spatial distortion phenomenon caused by the tunnel connecting. You can't see it, but the time axis is probably being distorted too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that okay? The Well was basically the core body of the time machine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that okay? The Well was basically the core body of the time machine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that okay? The Well was basically the core body of the time machine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That time machine already fulfilled its role when it opened the gateway to the past. It won't be usable again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That time machine already fulfilled its role when it opened the gateway to the past. It won't be usable again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That time machine already fulfilled its role when it opened the gateway to the past. It won't be usable again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We won't need to use it again anyway. We only had one chance to make use of the amplification tunnel to begin with.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We won't need to use it again anyway. We only had one chance to make use of the amplification tunnel to begin with.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We won't need to use it again anyway. We only had one chance to make use of the amplification tunnel to begin with.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
It looks just like a giant sinkhole leading to another world
8 8isekai!

It looks just like a giant sinkhole leading to another world
8 8isekai!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
It looks just like a giant sinkhole leading to another world
8 8isekai!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, that doesn't sound like a metaphor. It's basically the truth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just like in those isekai novels, where you have to defeat the Demon Lord of that world before you can return.

root.m_Talk_FRA: The hyperwide tunnel has been successfully deployed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since time has been converted into distance, I recommend using dimensional ships rather than traveling on foot.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Since time has been converted into distance, I recommend using dimensional ships rather than traveling on foot.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Gah...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gah...

root.m_Talk_DEU: This damned Well... it drained all my blood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This damned Well... it drained all my blood.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Even without blood, you're still alive.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Just... kill me...

root.m_Talk_DEU: Shall we go, Mina?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shall we go, Mina?
